content: Mithllon: The chill in the air tonight reminds me of Windhelm, though thankfully without the stench of fish and Nord hypocrisy clinging to every stone. Do you ever miss Morrowind, Jenassa? Jenassa: Miss the ash and slavery? No. Skyrim’s bloodshed may be crude, but at least its whores don’t pretend morality while bending over for Septim. I prefer blades that draw honest crimson. Mithllon: Honest crimson? Spoken like a true shadow-walker. Though I’ve seen you leave more than blood on your kills—watching you mount that bandit chief last week was… educational. Jenassa: He screamed prettier than his men fought. But if you’re craving a demonstration, Altmer, my fee’s the same whether it’s steel or skin parting. Though you might need magic to keep pace. Mithllon: Perhaps—though I’d wager my spells could leave you trembling louder than a hagraven in heat. Been a while since you’ve had proper Dunmer cock, hasn’t it? Or are the Nords’ clumsy thrusts enough? Jenassa: Most Nords fuck like draugr—all grunt and no finesse. But unlike you tower-bred pricks, at least they don’t whine when I leave teeth marks. Still… maybe I’ll let you prove your tongue’s as sharp as your enchantments. After a contract, of course. Gold first, groans after. Mithllon: Typical mercenary pragmatism. Fine—next time you gut a vampire nest, save the prettiest thrall for me. Nothing like watching you work up an appetite.

Jenassa: Spoken like a man who enjoys the show. But save your silver tongue, Altmer—unless you plan to put it to better use than just talk. Mithllon: A challenge, then. I'll let my magic—and my hands—do the convincing next time.
